summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Holdprint Sync Hub PWA. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend login, dashboard, Jobs page, and item assignment modal all working correctly. System migrated from MongoDB to Supabase is functioning properly.
critical_code_review_comments: Authentication system in auth_new.py is well-structured with proper password hashing and JWT token generation
Item assignment endpoint correctly handles both 'id' and 'user_id' for installer lookup (fix mentioned in context)
difficulty_level is correctly typed as Optional[str] in ItemAssignment model (fix mentioned in context)
Supabase wrapper in db_supabase.py provides MongoDB-like interface for smooth migration

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login, Dashboard, Jobs page, Job Detail, Item Assignment modal all working

seed_data_creation: None - used existing production data (98 jobs, 17+ installers)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: (1) Login with admin credentials works, (2) /api/auth/me returns user data, (3) /api/jobs returns 98 jobs, (4) /api/installers returns installers list, (5) /api/jobs/{job_id}/assign-items works with difficulty_level as string, (6) /api/auth/forgot-password and reset-password endpoints work, (7) Dashboard loads correctly, (8) Jobs page shows filters and job cards, (9) Item assignment modal opens and shows items/installers correctly.

features_tested.login_valid_credentials: PASS - Admin login with mktindustriavisual@gmail.com works
features_tested.auth_me_endpoint: PASS - Returns user data without password_hash
features_tested.jobs_listing: PASS - Returns 98 jobs with proper structure
features_tested.forgot_password: PASS - Returns success message (no email enumeration)
features_tested.jobs_page_search: PASS - Search input and filters present
features_tested.item_assignment_modal: PASS - Opens with items, installers, difficulty/scenario dropdowns
